title: Property Consultant - Knight Frank India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Knight Frank India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
